details.test: Task 1: Register vehicle for Sunset Coastal Cruise
Task 2: Buy two 1960s posters with standard shipping
Task 3: Join annual membership with priority parking
Task 4: Build personal schedule and open print view
Task 5: Register Camaro in show category
Task 6: Sign up for two non-overlapping volunteer shifts
Task 7: Add nearby hotel with covered parking to trip plan
Task 8: Subscribe to monthly restoration/swap newsletter
Task 9: Favorite three convertible award-winner photos from 2023 gallery
